search_memory.description: Queries that reference past conversations, stored memories, or previously discussed topics
examples: 我们之前讨论过的方案
上次说的那个项目分析
你还记得我们的对话吗

search_file.description: Queries about finding, referencing, or working with specific files
examples: 帮我找一下那个视频文件

general.description: General information queries, how-to questions, and explanation requests
examples: 帮我解释一下色彩校正
